name: cresa-one
description: Publish websites, apps, and files, and store private files in cloud Drives. Fallback installs package .skill and .zip archives for app import.

interface.shortDescription: Publish websites and store private agent files.
interface.longDescription: cresa.one lets agents publish websites, apps, and files, and store private files in cloud Drives. Publish HTML apps, documents, images, PDFs, videos, and static files to live URLs at {slug}.cresa.one or custom domains, or use private cloud Drives for agent files such as documents, context, memory, plans, assets, media, research, code, etc. Supports passwords, custom domains, proxy routes, and /cresa-one auto-update via the hosted installer — fallback installs also package .skill and .zip archives for app import; see cresa.one/docs for the full feature set.
